summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: VOP (Všeobecné obchodní podmínky), Registration terms checkbox, and GDPR auto-cleanup scheduler. All 9 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VOP API correctly returns 15 sections with proper structure (number, title, content array)

VOP sections cover all required topics: Úvodní ustanovení, Předmět služby, Uživatelský účet, Role platformy, Povinnosti Instituce/Provozovatele, Platební podmínky, SLA, Reklamace, GDPR, Cookies, Odpovědnost, Doba trvání, Změny podmínek, Závěrečná ustanovení
Registration form correctly validates terms_accepted checkbox with error message 'Pro pokračování musíte souhlasit s obchodními podmínkami'
Registration form has link to /obchodni-podminky from terms checkbox
GDPR auto-cleanup scheduler is registered and runs daily at 3:00 AM UTC
Admin settings VOP section loads and displays all 15 sections
GDPR 'Automatická anonymizace' toggle has correct description about auto-anonymization after retention period
context_for_next_testing_agent: VOP, Registration terms, and GDPR auto-cleanup features fully tested. Backend: 9 tests covering VOP API structure (15 sections, title, version), GDPR settings save/read, retention values. Frontend: /obchodni-podminky page displays all 15 VOP sections, /register page has two checkboxes (GDPR consent and terms_accepted) with link to VOP, form blocks submission if terms not accepted, Admin Settings > VOP section displays all 15 sections, Admin Settings > GDPR section has 'Automatická anonymizace' toggle with correct description. Scheduler logs confirm gdpr_auto_cleanup job is registered.

verified_features.feature: GET /api/legal/vop returns VOP with 15 sections, title and version
GET /api/legal/vop returns sections with correct structure (number, title, content array)
Frontend: /obchodni-podminky page renders VOP content with all 15 sections
Frontend: /register page shows two checkboxes - GDPR consent and terms acceptance
Frontend: /register page blocks submission if terms_accepted is not checked
Frontend: /register page has link to /obchodni-podminky from terms checkbox
Frontend: Admin settings shows 'Obchodní podmínky (VOP)' menu item
Frontend: Admin settings VOP section loads and displays all 15 VOP sections
Backend: GDPR auto-cleanup scheduler is registered (check scheduler jobs)
verified_features.status: VERIFIED (logs show 'Added job process_gdpr_auto_cleanup to job store')

verified_features.feature: Frontend: GDPR settings shows 'Automatická anonymizace' toggle with correct description
